config.open-menu-key.name: Open menu keybind
config.open-menu-key.tooltip: Keybind to open the wait menu. Default is Ctrl+W.
config.allow-festivals.name: Allow during festivals
config.allow-festivals.tooltip: If disabled, the wait menu won't open during festivals.
config.allow-events.name: Allow during events
config.allow-events.tooltip: If disabled, the wait menu won't open during cutscenes/events.
config.max-wait.name: Max wait minutes
config.max-wait.tooltip: Safety clamp for max minutes advanced per wait action.
config.stabilize.name: Stabilize after NPC teleport
config.stabilize.tooltip: Clears stale NPC pathing/animation state after placing NPCs at schedule destinations.
mobile-app.name: (TTG) Wait Menu
message.schedule-error: WaitMenu: An NPC schedule error occurred while advancing time. Check SMAPI log.
menu.title: Wait how long?
